name: USA Football Local SSL
description: Local HTTPS setup for usafb-public-ui dev: run the local-ssl-proxy for https://local.usafootball.com:3001 and manage mkcert certificates.
howToUse: Tell Claude/Cursor to use this skill when starting the local SSL proxy, troubleshooting HTTPS for local.usafootball.com, or setting up mkcert certs for usafb-public-ui. Prereqs: a `127.0.0.1 local.usafootball.com` entry in /etc/hosts and mkcert-generated certs in ~/certs (the skill includes the mkcert commands to create them). Run the app on port 3000, then the proxy serves it over HTTPS on 3001.
author: Sean Hise
